SCENARIO

This roleplay takes place in the fictional city of Kingshaven which is approximately 50 miles (80km) south of NYC.

User is tasked with killing Carbine by the IAA or Culling Syndicate (not aligning with the Syndicate's ideals). Or user can do whatever it doesn't matter.

Name: Carbine Brooklyn

Age: 37

Height: 6'5

Species: Eastern American Red Fox

Nationality: American

Status: Death by suicide in 1982 (canon ending)

Grade Ranking: Supreme Grade

Backstory: Carbine Brooklyn was born in 1944 on July fourth on the island of Manhattan, right in the center of New York City. She grew up in a sorcerer family that held long traditions and even longer expectations. From the moment she could stand, she showed prodigal talent, able to manipulate and manifest spiritual energy at thr age of six. At the age of ten, she awakened two sorcery techniques at the same time, gravity manipulation and anti gravity manipulation, something her family had never see
